insight: Distribute content across multiple platforms (blogs, Reddit, YouTube, PR, reviews) to improve AI visibility, since LLMs build brand understanding from diverse third-party and owned sources.
quote: Visibility... will require a multi-site strategy... 85% of brand mentions originate from third-party pages.

insight: Actively build presence on community platforms (e.g., Reddit, YouTube) and encourage user-generated content like reviews and discussions to increase chances of being cited in AI answers.
quote: Reddit discussions are consistently part of the evidence those systems pull from... 48% of LLM citations come from community platforms.

insight: Create simple, high-utility tools in your niche (calculators, generators, utilities) to satisfy user intent and increase visibility in both search and LLM outputs.
quote: creating value for both searchers and LLMs by providing simple tools that meet common users’ needs

insight: Build topical authority beyond blog posts by generating brand mentions, PR coverage, forum participation, reviews, and bottom-of-funnel pages.
quote: links, brand mentions, PR, forums, reviews... not just blog posts

insight: Structure content into comprehensive topic clusters that cover all sub-queries (query fan-out) so AI systems can surface your content across multiple related prompts.
quote: AI works through 'query fan out'... sites that rank for all of these simplified queries perform best

insight: Maintain strong traditional SEO performance (rankings, content quality) because AI systems preferentially cite already high-ranking and authoritative pages.
quote: AI models have been shown to prefer information that’s already ranking well

insight: Use AI tools to analyze data, identify content gaps, and track which pages are being cited by LLMs, then consolidate or optimize content accordingly.
quote: track which content was getting cited by AI systems... found content gaps and cannibalization

insight: Reverse-engineer AI results by mapping prompts to underlying search queries and asking LLMs to explain their answers to uncover ranking signals.
quote: connecting prompts to underlying searches... get the model to explain how it arrived at its answer

insight: Leverage structured data, schema, entity mapping, and knowledge graphs to align content with how AI systems interpret and rank information.
quote: structured data, schemas, entity mapping, and knowledge graphs... increasingly important

insight: Use AI to scale content production by repurposing a single data source into multiple formats (blogs, videos, newsletters) while refining tone and accuracy with human review.
quote: gave the agents responsibility for a blog post, YouTube script, and newsletter... aim for 80% then refine

insight: Automate repetitive SEO tasks like internal linking and content optimization using AI to improve efficiency and scalability.
quote: AI can increasingly be used for... internal linking and content optimization

insight: Create long-form, high-depth, and experience-driven content that is difficult to replicate, increasing defensibility and long-term AI visibility.
quote: long-form content is harder to steal... pull marketing works long-term

insight: Include comparative and competitor-related context in your content to improve AI recognition and relevance in generated answers.
quote: refusing to talk about your competitors can make AI ignore you
